---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
---


```{r}
library(tidyverse)
horizon <- read_csv(
  "www/ALIGN_health_product_data_horizon.csv",
  # "www/horizon_temporary_products.csv",
  n_max = 300,
  na = c("", "NA", "na", "Unknown", "unknown"),
) |>
  mutate(
    # parsing date format for phases
    phase_1_date = parse_date_time(
      phase_1_date,
      orders = c("d-b-y", "d-b-Y", "m/d/y", "m/d/Y"),
      exact = FALSE
    ) |>
      as_date(),
    phase_2_date = parse_date_time(
      phase_2_date,
      orders = c("d-b-y", "d-b-Y", "m/d/y", "m/d/Y"),
      exact = FALSE
    ) |>
      as_date(),
    phase_3_date = parse_date_time(
      phase_3_date,
      orders = c("d-b-y", "d-b-Y", "m/d/y", "m/d/Y"),
      exact = FALSE
    ) |>
      as_date(),
    phase_4_date = parse_date_time(
      phase_4_date,
      orders = c("d-b-y", "d-b-Y", "m/d/y", "m/d/Y"),
      exact = FALSE
    ) |>
      as_date(),
    # convert all *_eml_date columns (year only) to full Date
    across(
      contains("eml_date"),
      ~ {
        # if entire column is missing, return as-is
        if (all(is.na(.x))) {
          return(.x)
        }

        # otherwise convert year → Date
        year <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(.x))
        make_date(year, 1L, 1L)
      }
    ),
    trial_status = ifelse(
      trial_status == "Approved / Marketed",
      "Marketing authorization",
      trial_status
    )
  )


horizon |>
  count(innovation) |>
  filter(n > 1) |>
  pull(innovation)
# removing duplicate rows, but selecting the one that has more data filled

horizon <- horizon |>
  mutate(
    n_missing = rowSums(is.na(across(-c(innovation, disease))))
  ) |>
  group_by(innovation, disease) |>
  slice_min(n_missing, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) |>
  ungroup() |>
  select(-n_missing)

gra_body_issues <- c(
  "Center for Drug standard control organization (CDSCO), India",
  "China Medical Products Administration (NMPA)",
  "Drug Regulatory Authority of Pakistan",
  "European Medical Agency",
  "Japan",
  "Korea MFDS;CE-IVDD;WHO recommended",
  "Korean Ministry of Food and Drug Safety",
  "Medicines and Healthcare products Regulatory Agency (MHRA) of the United Kingdom (UK)"
)
horizon <- horizon |>
  mutate(
    # for cases where the gra_body variable had data referring to national level not from
    other_nra = case_when(
      gra_body %in% gra_body_issues ~ gra_body,
      TRUE ~ other_nra
    ),
    gra_body = case_when(
      gra_body %in% gra_body_issues ~ NA_character_,
      (is.na(gra_body) | gra_body == "No") & startsWith(gra_note, "CE") ~ "CE", # european
      # trial status misscollected as PQ or CE
      trial_status == "WHO_PQ" & is.na(gra_body) ~ "WHO PQ",
      trial_status == "CE Marked" & is.na(gra) ~ "CE",
      TRUE ~ gra_body
    ),
    # If there is something in gra_note, gra should be Yes - unless if it starts with "Phase 2 was terminated"
    gra = case_when(
      startsWith(gra_note, "Phase 2 was t") ~ gra,
      !is.na(gra_note) & gra == "No" ~ "Yes",
      !is.na(gra_note) & is.na(gra) ~ "Yes",
      !is.na(gra_body) & is.na(gra) ~ "Yes",
      !is.na(gra_body) & gra == "No" ~ "Yes",
      trial_status == "WHO_PQ" & (is.na(gra) | gra == "No") ~ "Yes",
      trial_status == "CE Marked" & (is.na(gra) | gra == "No") ~ "Yes",
      TRUE ~ gra
    ),
    # Trial status fix categories
    trial_status = case_when(
      trial_status %in%
        c(
          "CE Marked",
          "WHO_PQ"
        ) ~ "Phase 4",
      TRUE ~ trial_status
    ),
    phase_1_status = case_when(
      is.na(phase_1_status) & !is.na(phase_1_date) ~ "Completed",
      is.na(phase_1_status) & trial_status == "Phase 1" ~ "Completed",
      TRUE ~ phase_1_status
    ),
    phase_2_status = case_when(
      is.na(phase_2_status) & !is.na(phase_2_date) ~ "Completed",
      is.na(phase_2_status) & trial_status == "Phase 2" ~ "Completed",
      TRUE ~ phase_2_status
    ),
    phase_3_status = case_when(
      is.na(phase_3_status) & !is.na(phase_3_date) ~ "Completed",
      phase_3_status %in% c('Yes', 'Yes_Completed') ~ "Completed",
      is.na(phase_3_status) & trial_status == "Phase 3" ~ "Completed",
      TRUE ~ phase_3_status
    ),
    phase_4_status = case_when(
      is.na(phase_4_status) & !is.na(phase_4_date) ~ "Completed",
      phase_4_status %in% c('Yes', 'Yes_Completed') ~ "Completed",
      is.na(phase_4_status) & trial_status == "Phase 4" ~ "Completed",
      TRUE ~ phase_4_status
    ),
    date_trial_status = parse_date_time(
      date_trial_status,
      orders = c("d-b-y", "d-b-Y", "m/d/y", "m/d/Y"),
      exact = FALSE
    ) |>
      as_date(),
    # Date for trial phases
    phase_1_date = if_else(
      is.na(phase_1_date) &
        trial_status == "Phase 1" &
        !is.na(date_trial_status),
      date_trial_status,
      phase_1_date
    ),
    phase_2_date = if_else(
      is.na(phase_2_date) &
        trial_status == "Phase 2" &
        !is.na(date_trial_status),
      date_trial_status,
      phase_2_date
    ),
    phase_3_date = if_else(
      is.na(phase_3_date) &
        trial_status == "Phase 3" &
        !is.na(date_trial_status),
      date_trial_status,
      phase_3_date
    ) |>
      as_date(),
    phase_4_date = if_else(
      is.na(phase_4_date) &
        trial_status == "Phase 4" &
        !is.na(date_trial_status),
      date_trial_status,
      phase_4_date
    ),
    # Archetype
    archetype = case_when(
      archetype %in%
        c(
          "Diagnostics ‚Äî Assay development",
          "Diagnostics — Assay development"
        ) ~ "Diagnostics — Assay development",
      archetype %in%
        c(
          "New Chemical Entity ‚Äî Simple",
          "NEW Chemical Entity"
        ) ~ "New Chemical Entity",
      archetype %in%
        c(
          "Unclassified / Insufficient information",
          "Unclassified"
        ) ~ NA_character_,
      archetype == "Vaccine — Simple" ~ "Vaccine",
      archetype == "repurposed" ~ "Repurposed",
      TRUE ~ archetype
    )
  )
```

"Archetype" and "Indication" does not work.

```{r}
# horizon.columns
nra <- horizon |>
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c("south_africa_nra", "kenya_nra", "senegal_nra"),
    names_to = "scope",
    values_to = "nra"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    scope = recode(
      scope,
      "kenya_nra" = "Kenya",
      "south_africa_nra" = "South Africa",
      "senegal_nra" = "Senegal"
    )
  ) |>
  select(innovation, nra, scope, disease)

nra_date <- horizon |>
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(
      "south_africa_nra_date",
      "kenya_nra_date",
      "senegal_nra_date",
      "other_nra_date"
    ),
    names_to = "scope",
    values_to = "nra_date"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    scope = recode(
      scope,
      "kenya_nra_date" = "Kenya",
      "south_africa_nra_date" = "South Africa",
      "senegal_nra_date" = "Senegal",
      "other_nra_date" = "Other"
    )
  ) |>
  select(innovation, scope, nra_date, disease) 


## GRA
gra <- horizon |>
  select(innovation, gra, gra_date, gra_body, disease) |>
  # Many typos, many errors, many fields with issues
  mutate(
    gra_body = gra_body,
    gra_body = gra_body |>
      str_replace_all("\n", ";") |>
      str_to_upper() |>
      str_trim(),
    gra_body = gra_body |>
      str_replace_all("US FDA|FDA_US|USFDA", "US_FDA") |>
      str_replace_all("WHO-PQ|WHO RECOMMENDED", "WHO_PQ") |>
      str_replace_all("CE-IVDD|CE-IVD MARK|CE-IVD|^CE$", "CE_IVD") |>
      str_replace_all("CE-IVDR", "CE_IVDR") |>
      str_replace_all("ANVISA", "ANVISA_BR") |>
      str_replace_all(
        "NMPA|CHINA MEDICAL PRODUCTS ADMINISTRATION",
        "NMPA_CN"
      ) |>
      str_replace_all("KOREAN MINISTRY.*|KMFDS|KOREA MFDS", "MFDS_KR") |>
      str_replace_all("CDSCO", "CDSCO_IN"),
    gra = ifelse(!is.na(gra_body), "Yes", gra),
    # Fixing GRA Date
    # Standardize blank / "NA" strings
    gra_date = na_if(str_trim(gra_date), "NA"),
    # Parse multiple formats
    gra_date = parse_date_time(
      gra_date,
      orders = c("d-b-y", "d-b-Y", "m/d/y", "m/d/Y"),
      exact = FALSE
    ) |>
      as_date()
  )

## EML
eml <- horizon |>
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c("kenya_eml", "senegal_eml", "south_africa_eml", "who_eml"),
    values_to = "eml",
    names_to = "scope"
  ) |>
  select(innovation, eml, scope, disease) |>
  mutate(
    scope = recode(
      scope,
      "kenya_eml" = "Kenya",
      "senegal_eml" = "Senegal",
      "south_africa_eml" = "South Africa",
      "who_eml" = "WHO"
    )
  )

eml_date <- horizon |>
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(
      "kenya_eml_date",
      "senegal_eml_date",
      "south_africa_eml_date",
      "who_eml_date"
    ),
    names_to = "scope",
    values_to = "eml_date"
  ) |>
  select(innovation, eml_date, scope, disease) |>
  mutate(
    scope = recode(
      scope,
      "kenya_eml_date" = "Kenya",
      "senegal_eml_date" = "Senegal",
      "south_africa_eml_date" = "South Africa",
      "who_eml_date" = "WHO"
    )
  )
```

## Merging

```{r}
glue::glue(
  "Horizon {nrow(horizon)}; EML {nrow(eml)}; EML Date {nrow(eml_date)};NRA {nrow(nra)}; NRA Date {nrow(nra)}; GRA {nrow(gra)}"
)

cleaned_horizon <- eml |>
  left_join(
    eml_date,
    by = join_by(innovation == innovation, scope == scope, disease == disease)
  ) |>
  left_join(
    nra |>
      filter(!is.na(nra)),
    by = join_by(innovation == innovation, scope == scope, disease == disease)
  ) |>
  left_join(
    nra_date,
    by = join_by(innovation == innovation, scope == scope, disease == disease)
  ) |>
  mutate(nra_date = NA) |>
  # the GRA data is not scoped, so it will be a many to many relation
  left_join(
    gra |>
      filter(!is.na(gra)),
    by = join_by(innovation == innovation, disease == disease)
  ) |>
  left_join(
    horizon |>
      select(
        -matches("nra|eml|gra")
      ),
    by = join_by(innovation == innovation, disease == disease)
  )

```

# calculating time to introduction metrics

```{r}
stage_levels <- c(
  "Phase 1",
  "Phase 2",
  "Phase 3",
  "Phase 4"
  # "Approved / Marketed"
)

cleaned_horizon <- cleaned_horizon |>
  mutate(
    trial_status = factor(trial_status, levels = stage_levels, ordered = TRUE),

    # -------------------------
    # Core derived dates
    # -------------------------
    date_proof_of_concept = case_when(
      !is.na(phase_2_date) ~ phase_2_date,
      trial_status != "Phase 1" ~ date_trial_status,
      TRUE ~ NA_Date_
    ),

    date_first_regulatory = case_when(
      !is.na(nra_date) ~ nra_date,
      !is.na(gra_date) ~ gra_date,
      trial_status == "Approved / Marketed" ~ date_trial_status,
      TRUE ~ NA_Date_
    ),

    date_first_launch = coalesce(
      eml_date,
      date_first_regulatory
    ),

    # -------------------------
    # Observed flags
    # -------------------------
    date_proof_of_concept_observed_y_n = if_else(
      !is.na(date_proof_of_concept),
      "Y",
      "N"
    ),
    date_first_regulatory_observed_y_n = if_else(
      !is.na(date_first_regulatory),
      "Y",
      "N"
    ),
    date_first_launch_observed_y_n = if_else(
      !is.na(date_first_launch),
      "Y",
      "N"
    ),

    # -------------------------
    # Regulatory projections
    # -------------------------
    proj_date_first_regulatory = coalesce(
      date_first_regulatory,
      date_proof_of_concept + dyears(2.62)
    ),

    proj_date_first_regulatory_25 = case_when(
      !is.na(date_proof_of_concept) ~ date_proof_of_concept + dyears(0.56),
      TRUE ~ NA_Date_
    ),

    proj_date_first_regulatory_75 = case_when(
      !is.na(date_proof_of_concept) ~ date_proof_of_concept + dyears(4.41),
      TRUE ~ NA_Date_
    ),

    # -------------------------
    # Launch projections
    # -------------------------
    proj_date_first_launch = coalesce(
      date_first_launch,
      proj_date_first_regulatory + dyears(0.32)
    ),

    proj_date_first_launch_25 = case_when(
      !is.na(proj_date_first_regulatory_25) ~ proj_date_first_regulatory_25 +
        dyears(0.15),
      !is.na(proj_date_first_regulatory) ~ proj_date_first_regulatory +
        dyears(0.15),
      TRUE ~ NA_Date_
    ),

    proj_date_first_launch_75 = case_when(
      !is.na(proj_date_first_regulatory_75) ~ proj_date_first_regulatory_75 +
        dyears(0.98),
      !is.na(proj_date_first_regulatory) ~ proj_date_first_regulatory +
        dyears(0.98),
      TRUE ~ NA_Date_
    ),

    # -------------------------
    # LMIC uptake projections
    # -------------------------
    proj_date_lmic_20_uptake = case_when(
      !is.na(proj_date_first_launch) ~ proj_date_first_launch + dyears(5),
      TRUE ~ NA_Date_
    ),

    proj_date_lmic_20_uptake_25 = case_when(
      !is.na(proj_date_first_launch_25) ~ proj_date_first_launch_25 +
        dyears(3.5),
      !is.na(proj_date_first_launch) ~ proj_date_first_launch + dyears(3.5),
      TRUE ~ NA_Date_
    ),

    proj_date_lmic_20_uptake_75 = case_when(
      !is.na(proj_date_first_launch_75) ~ proj_date_first_launch_75 +
        dyears(21),
      !is.na(proj_date_first_launch) ~ proj_date_first_launch + dyears(21),
      TRUE ~ NA_Date_
    ),
    # =========================
    # BACKWARD: Regulatory
    # =========================
    proj_date_first_regulatory = coalesce(
      proj_date_first_regulatory,
      date_first_launch - dyears(0.32),
      proj_date_first_launch - dyears(0.32)
    ),

    proj_date_first_regulatory_25 = coalesce(
      proj_date_first_regulatory_25,
      proj_date_first_launch_25 - dyears(0.15),
      proj_date_first_launch - dyears(0.15)
    ),

    proj_date_first_regulatory_75 = coalesce(
      proj_date_first_regulatory_75,
      proj_date_first_launch_75 - dyears(0.98),
      proj_date_first_launch - dyears(0.98)
    ),

    # =========================
    # BACKWARD: Proof of Concept
    # =========================
    date_proof_of_concept = coalesce(
      date_proof_of_concept,
      date_first_regulatory - dyears(2.62),
      proj_date_first_regulatory - dyears(2.62)
    ),

    proj_date_first_regulatory_25 = coalesce(
      proj_date_first_regulatory_25,
      date_proof_of_concept + dyears(0.56)
    ),

    proj_date_first_regulatory_75 = coalesce(
      proj_date_first_regulatory_75,
      date_proof_of_concept + dyears(4.41)
    ),

    # =========================
    # Forward consistency after backfill
    # =========================
    proj_date_first_launch = coalesce(
      proj_date_first_launch,
      proj_date_first_regulatory + dyears(0.32)
    )
  )
  
cleaned_horizon <- cleaned_horizon |>
  mutate(across(
    c(
      date_proof_of_concept,
      date_first_regulatory,
      date_first_launch,
      starts_with("proj_date_")
    ),
    as.Date
  ))
```

# Transforming back to wide again

```{r}
final_wide <- cleaned_horizon |>
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = scope,
    values_from = c(eml, eml_date, nra, nra_date),
    names_glue = "{scope}_{.value}"
  )

final_wide <- final_wide |>
  left_join(
    horizon |>
      select(
        other_nra,
        other_nra_date,
        nra_other_body,
        gra_note,
        innovation,
        disease
      )
  )

cols <- c(
  "innovation",
  "dose",
  "form",
  "alternative_names",
  "category",
  "technology",
  "disease",
  "target_population",
  "indication",
  "archetype",
  "phase_1_status",
  "phase_1_date",
  "phase_2_status",
  "phase_2_date",
  "phase_3_status",
  "phase_3_date",
  "phase_4_status",
  "phase_4_date",
  "trial_status",
  "trial_status_notes",
  "date_trial_status",
  "kenya_nra",
  "kenya_nra_date",
  "senegal_nra",
  "senegal_nra_date",
  "south_africa_nra",
  "south_africa_nra_date",
  "other_nra",
  "other_nra_date",
  "nra_other_body",
  "kenya_eml",
  "kenya_eml_date",
  "senegal_eml",
  "senegal_eml_date",
  "south_africa_eml",
  "south_africa_eml_date",
  "who_eml",
  "who_eml_date",
  "gra",
  "gra_date",
  "gra_body",
  "gra_note",
  "manufacturer",
  "dalys",
  "disease_prevalence",
  "improvement",
  "dalys_averted",
  "deaths_averted",
  "yll",
  "hs_costs",
  "dalys_monetized",
  "prob_success",
  "procurement",
  "reg_approval",
  "policy_readiness",
  "social_context",
  "guidelines",
  "policy_implemented",
  "date_market",
  "country_supply",
  "distribution",
  "delivery_model",
  "efficacy",
  "date_proof_of_concept",
  "date_proof_of_concept_observed_y_n",
  "date_first_regulatory",
  "date_first_regulatory_observed_y_n",
  "date_first_launch",
  "date_first_launch_observed_y_n",
  "proj_date_first_regulatory",
  "proj_date_first_regulatory_25",
  "proj_date_first_regulatory_75",
  "proj_date_first_launch",
  "proj_date_first_launch_25",
  "proj_date_first_launch_75",
  "proj_date_lmic_20_uptake",
  "proj_date_lmic_20_uptake_25",
  "proj_date_lmic_20_uptake_75",
  "readiness",
  "financing",
  "impact_potential",
  "introduction_readiness",
  "data_source"
)


final_wide <- final_wide |>
  rename_with(tolower) |>
  select(-c(who_nra)) |>
  rename_with(~ str_replace_all(.x, " ", "_")) |> 
  select(any_of(cols))

final_wide |> 
  write_csv("www/ALIGN_health_product_data_horizon_wide.csv")
```


# Saving
```{r}
cleaned_horizon |> 
  write_csv("www/ALIGN_health_product_data_horizon_cleaned.csv")
```
